name: Mock Lobster Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the fresh tomatoes and chop into small pieces. If using canned tomatoes, drain them first and mash or chop.
2. Add finely chopped green bell pepper, celery ribs, and onion to the chopped tomatoes.
3. Incorporate enough cracker crumbs to absorb tomato juice (you may need more than 1½ cups if using juicy tomatoes).
4. Mix in 1½ tablespoons of mayonnaise into the tomato mixture.
5. Stir in an additional ½ tablespoon of mayonnaise, if needed, to achieve the desired consistency.
6. Add chopped hard-cooked eggs and toss lightly until well combined.
7. Chill the salad before serving on lettuce leaves.
